key_insight: PepsiCo deployed two optimization systems—PromoAI and PricingAI—that combine machine learning with mathematical programming to automate large-scale promotion and pricing decisions.
engineering_relevance: The work shows how enterprise revenue management can be scaled across huge product portfolios by turning business rules, demand models, and financial goals into solvable optimization problems.
method: PromoAI: machine-learning promotional forecasts + mixed-integer linear programming to optimize promotional calendars.
PricingAI: Bayesian hierarchical elasticity models + nonlinear programming to recommend base price changes.
Both systems search large decision spaces under customizable operational and business constraints.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports real-world deployment at PepsiCo and emphasizes that the systems can search millions of product-promotion-timing combinations at scale.
watch_item: Performance depends on the quality of demand, elasticity, and competitor-interaction estimates, so model drift or poor data can weaken recommendations.
paper_title: PepsiCo Deploys AI-Driven Pricing and Promotion Optimization at Scale
